name: riomedica-detailing-app
description: Riomedica Healthcare Detailing and Admin App

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
